title: molten salty German dough fritters
description: deep-fried dough balls filled with a gooey speculaas-spiced centre, perfect for a snack or dessert
instructions: mix flour, sugar, and yeast in a large bowl
add softened butter and mix until a dough forms
knead the dough for about 10 minutes until it becomes smooth
let the dough rise in a warm place for about 1 hour
divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces
roll each piece into a ball and flatten it slightly into a disk shape
place a tablespoon of speculaas-spiced filling in the centre of each disk
fold the dough over the filling to form a ball and press the edges together to seal
heat about 2-3 inches of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F
fry the dough balls for about 2-3 minutes on each side until they're golden brown and puffed up
drain the fritters on paper towels and serve warm
